The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    11	    ;
    12	
    13	postfixExpression
    14	    :   primaryExpression  
    15	    |   postfixExpression LeftParen RightParen
    16	    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	    ;
    18	
    19	unaryExpression
    20	    :   postfixExpression
    21	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    22	    ;
    23	
    24	unaryOperator
    25	    :   Plus | Minus | Exclaim
    26	    ;
    27	
    28	multiplicativeExpression
    29	    :   unaryExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) unaryExpression)*
    30	    ;
    31	
    32	additiveExpression
    33	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    34	    ;
    35	
    36	relationalExpression
    37	    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    38	    ;
    39	
    40	equalityExpression
    41	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    42	    ;
    43	
    44	logicalAndExpression
    45	    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    46	    ;
    47	
    48	logicalOrExpression
    49	    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    50	    ;
    51	
    52	assignmentExpression
    53	    :   logicalOrExpression
    54	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    55	    ;
    56	
    57	expression
    58	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    59	    ;
    60	
    61	
    62	declaration
    63	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    64	    ;
    65	
    66	declarationSpecifiers
    67	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    68	    ;
    69	
    70	declarationSpecifier
    71	    :   typeSpecifier
    72	    |   Const
    73	    ;
    74	
    75	initDeclaratorList
    76	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    77	    ;
    78	
    79	initDeclarator
    80	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    81	    ;
    82	
    83	
    84	typeSpecifier
    85	    :   Int
    86	    |   Void
    87	    ;
    88	
    89	
    90	declarator
    91	    :   directDeclarator
    92	    ;
    93	
    94	directDeclarator
    95	    :   Identifier
    96	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
    97	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	identifierList
   101	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   102	    ;
   103	
   104	initializer
   105	    :   assignmentExpression
   106	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
   107	    ;
   108	
   109	initializerList
   110	    // :   designation? initializer (Comma designation? initializer)*
   111	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   112	    ;
   113	
   114	statement
   115	    :   compoundStatement
   116	    |   expressionStatement
   117	    |   selectionStatement
   118	    |   iterationStatement
   119	    |   jumpStatement
   120	    ;
   121	
   122	compoundStatement
   123	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   124	    ;
   125	
   126	blockItemList
   127	    :   blockItem+
   128	    ;
   129	
   130	blockItem
   131	    :   statement
   132	    |   declaration
   133	    ;
   134	
   135	expressionStatement
   136	    :   expression? Semi
   137	    ;
   138	
   139	selectionStatement
   140	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   141	    ;
   142	
   143	iterationStatement
   144	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   145	    ;
   146	
   147	jumpStatement
   148	    :   (Return expression? | Break | Continue)
   149	    Semi
   150	    ;
   151	
   152	compilationUnit
   153	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   154	    ;
   155	
   156	translationUnit
   157	    :   externalDeclaration+
   158	    ;
   159	
   160	externalDeclaration
   161	    :   functionDefinition
   162	    |   declaration
   163	    ;
   164	
   165	functionDefinition
   166	    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen RightParen compoundStatement
   167	    ;
   168	
   169
